response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue matches the promotional video sections perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Performed 100% manual transcription and translation as the reference JSON did not contain the text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue strictly to character vocal cues, and added visual event translation for the main starting screen and attention notice to assist viewers.

subtitles.original: Be sure to check out our booth at...
subtitles.english: Be sure to check out our booth at...

subtitles.original: And all of hololive BASE is here with me!
subtitles.english: And all of hololive BASE is here with me!

subtitles.original: hololive BASE is coming to Round 1 USA locations nationwide,
subtitles.english: hololive BASE is coming to Round 1 USA locations nationwide,

subtitles.original: Follow @round1usa on Instagram and X so you don't miss out on any updates!
subtitles.english: Follow @round1usa on Instagram and X so you don't miss out on any updates!

subtitles.original: We can't wait to see you there!
subtitles.english: We can't wait to see you there!

subtitles.original: 開演までしばらくお待ちください
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: [注意事項] 公演中のフラッシュライトにご注意ください。大声での声援は可能です。
subtitles.english: [Attention] Please be aware of flashing lights. Cheering loudly is OK.
